meta.title: Aethos Solutions — Automation & Web Development
meta.description: We automate lead capture and follow-up for small businesses. No complexity, real results. Operating in Spain and Romania.

hero.subtitle: We automate lead capture, follow-up and conversion so you can focus on what really matters. No complexity, real results from day one.
hero.tagline: Operating in Spain and Romania · Free consultation, no strings attached

problems.body: Most small businesses lose clients and time every day for lack of automated systems. It's not about working harder. It's about having the right tools.

items.title: Unanswered leads
items.desc: Forms arrive and nobody follows up. Potential clients slip away without you even noticing.

items.title: No follow-up system
items.desc: Without a system, every follow-up depends on someone remembering. And nobody always remembers.

items.title: Manual work that doesn't scale
items.desc: Copying data, sending emails one by one, updating spreadsheets. Hours lost every week.

items.title: No business visibility
items.desc: You don't know how many leads you have, where they come from, or what your real conversion rate is.

services.body: Every tool is designed to work for you while you focus on what you do best.

items.title: Web development
items.desc: Professional, fast websites designed to convert visitors into clients. SEO and mobile optimization included.

items.title: Process automation
items.desc: Automatic workflows that handle repetitive tasks: replies, notifications, status updates.

items.title: Customer management (CRM)
items.desc: Centralized system to track every lead and client from first contact to closing the deal.

items.title: Automatic WhatsApp & email
items.desc: Automatic replies and follow-ups via WhatsApp and email. Your clients get a response in minutes.

items.title: Real-time dashboards
items.desc: See your business status at any time. Leads, sales and conversions, all in one clear panel.

items.title: Internal tools
items.desc: Custom apps and panels so your team works faster, with fewer errors and more visibility.

workflow.body: A complete, automated workflow that runs 24 hours a day without you lifting a finger.

steps.title: Form
steps.desc: The client fills in the form on your website or landing page.

steps.title: Automation
steps.desc: The system instantly captures, validates and classifies the lead.

steps.title: Contact
steps.desc: Automatic reply via WhatsApp or email in less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: CRM
steps.desc: The lead enters your CRM directly, organized and ready to manage.

steps.title: Follow-up
steps.desc: Automatic reminders and sequences until the deal is closed.

beforeAfter.body: The real difference that having the right system working for your business makes.

cta.body: Free consultation. No commitment, no jargon. We'll explain exactly what we can do for your business.

footer.tagline: Automation and web development for small businesses and local companies. Less complexity, more real results.
footer.madeWith: Made with care in Spain & Romania
